description: Letter, late, writtenb by Yom Tov Qashtiel, with a Hebrew signature stamp. Addressed on verso "to the hand of the dear modest Masʿūda מב׳׳ת, to Jerusalem." Based on the opening lines of the letter, it seems that Yom Tov was writing to his mother Masʿūda (אלעזיזה אלמכרומה אמי).
tags: late Jerusalem, women's letter, Women's letters, early modern
description_he: מכתב לירושלים. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
